utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final coverage plan: (1) health_coverage is present and fully detailed with physical and mental health insurance and costs—complete. (2) property_coverage is present but lacks explicit costs—it does not mention a monthly or annual cost, so incomplete. (3) travel_coverage is present but also lacks cost information—incomplete. (4) additional_services is present with detailed service features but no costs—incomplete. (5) total_budget is present with both monthly and annual costs and comparison—complete. Therefore, 2 items (health_coverage and total_budget) are fully specified out of 5 total items.

In the ground-truth dataset, the corresponding entries are 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health under primary_health_coverage, 'VitalPlus Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, and 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. These each have explicit ratings of 6 (physical health), 7 (mental health), 6 (property coverage), and 6 (travel coverage). Therefore, we map each component of the final coverage plan to these ratings accordingly.
